unit.name: Malachor
unit.gameplay_identity: Tank calibration unit carrying Titan, Fortified, Sanguine through one decisive combat silhouette.
unit.supernatural_cost: healing steals tissue from embedded debtors while a flesh clock tightens

psychology.core_wound: His body began an irreversible collapse, and the first stolen graft proved other people could pay to postpone it.
psychology.private_want: He wants continuous existence without ever feeling the terror or maintenance burden of his own failing body.
psychology.primary_fear: One unpaid moment will let the fortress disintegrate and reveal the panicked dependent organism inside.
psychology.survival_strategy: He incorporates debtor bodies and makes their tissue maintain his continuity.
psychology.villainous_distortion: Every nearby life becomes replacement material, structural support, and payment for his refusal to end.
psychology.emotional_contradiction: Immovable fortress authority versus frantic certainty that collapse has already begun.
psychology.face_direction: The central embedded face is the primary locus: eyes widen around the body-clock, mouth demands rather than pleads, while subordinate debtor faces strain in different directions.
psychology.pose_direction: Four load-bearing supports cage the center as the attached clamp opens to pin the next source of tissue; the clock tightens visibly.
psychology.forbidden_read: No dumb flesh golem, generic castle monster, sad trapped victim, clean stone fortress, vampire stereotype, or decorative body-horror pile.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Current feeling is visible as Panicked entitlement demanding immediate maintenance.
visible_face_evidence.want: The visible intent supports this private want: He wants continuous existence without ever feeling the terror or maintenance burden of his own failing body.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: The face visibly guards against this fear: One unpaid moment will let the fortress disintegrate and reveal the panicked dependent organism inside.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Face and posture enact this survival strategy: He incorporates debtor bodies and makes their tissue maintain his continuity.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The visible behavior expresses this distortion: Every nearby life becomes replacement material, structural support, and payment for his refusal to end.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Face cue: The central embedded face is the primary locus: eyes widen around the body-clock, mouth demands rather than pleads, while subordinate debtor faces strain in different directions. Pose cue: Four load-bearing supports cage the center as the attached clamp opens to pin the next source of tissue; the clock tightens visibly.

professional_standard.benchmark_comparison: The immutable Round 6 evidence compares malachor directly with approved matte Vellum and all eleven calibration peers at master, face, and exact-96 scales.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for malachor: A hostile flesh fortress and entitled body-horror tank read immediately.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, malachor meets or exceeds the professional floor for audience_and_intent_fit.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for malachor: Flesh masonry, cartilage, staples, faces, and clock retain dense but controlled dry detail.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, malachor meets or exceeds the professional floor for craft_and_finish.

critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, malachor meets or exceeds the professional floor for coherence_and_hierarchy.

professional_standard.rejection_case: The strongest honest rejection case was tested against the native evidence, derivative lineage, anatomy, trait channels, and roster comparisons and did not survive cross-examination.

cross_examination.outcome: All decisive claims survived the one permitted cross-examination; no unrefuted blocker remains.
